pages.title: /logicore
pages.text: All mod commands are available under the $(bold)/logicore$() root command.$(br)$(br)These commands require $(italic)op level 2$() permissions to execute.$(br)$(br)Subcommands are organized into two groups: $(l:logicore:commands/commands#network_text)network$() and $(l:logicore:commands/commands#knowledge_list)knowledge$().

pages.title: /logicore network
pages.text: $(bold)list$()$(br)Lists all active computation networks and their unique IDs. Useful for debugging and monitoring network topology.$(br)$(br)$(bold)clear$()$(br)Removes all registered computation networks from the world. Use with caution — this cannot be undone.

pages.title: Knowledge list
pages.text: $(bold)/logicore knowledge list$()$(br)Displays the names of all items you have researched so far directly in chat.

pages.title: Knowledge clear
pages.text: $(bold)/logicore knowledge clear$()$(br)Wipes your entire research knowledge database. All items will need to be researched again.

pages.title: Knowledge show
pages.text: $(bold)/logicore knowledge show$()$(br)Opens the Knowledge Base UI — a scrollable 9x9 grid showing all researched items with a search bar to quickly find specific entries.
